name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Epic Filenames
notes: This building block detects when Epic files are discovered.
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Epic Filenames on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log

when the event category for the event is one of the following System.File Created, Audit.File Move Success, Audit.File Move Attempt, Audit.File Download Success, Audit.File Download Attempt, Audit.File Access Success, Audit.File Access Attempt, Audit.Object Access Success, Audit.Object Access Attempt

when the event matches LOWER("Filename") in ('zagruzchik.dll') OR LOWER("Filename") in ('ؤتمر جنيف.rar') OR LOWER("Filename") in ('nato position on syria.scr') OR LOWER("Filename") MATCHES ('note_№107-41d.pdf') OR LOWER("Filename") in ('talking points.scr') OR LOWER("Filename") in ('border_security_protocol.rar') OR LOWER("Filename") in ('security protocol.scr') OR LOWER("Filename") in ('program.scr') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Epic Filenames on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log

AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.File Created, Audit.File Move Success, Audit.File Move Attempt, Audit.File Download Success, Audit.File Download Attempt, Audit.File Access Success, Audit.File Access Attempt, Audit.Object Access Success, Audit.Object Access Attempt

AND when the event matches LOWER("Filename") in ('zagruzchik.dll') OR LOWER("Filename") in ('ؤتمر جنيف.rar') OR LOWER("Filename") in ('nato position on syria.scr') OR LOWER("Filename") MATCHES ('note_№107-41d.pdf') OR LOWER("Filename") in ('talking points.scr') OR LOWER("Filename") in ('border_security_protocol.rar') OR LOWER("Filename") in ('security protocol.scr') OR LOWER("Filename") in ('program.scr') AQL filter query
